user_prompt: My orbital strike relay is ready for reset
prayer:
Approach the orbital strike relay with mechadendrite-extended reverence and intone the Litany of Reinitialisation.
Initiate the reset protocols upon its void-linked transponders, beseeching the Machine Spirit's forgiveness for prior data-taint.
Anoint the orbital strike relay's cogitator nodes with sacred oils distilled from ferrox-pattern crucibles.
Invoke the Omnissiah's grace to complete the reset, verifying auspex purity through binary canticles.
Confirm the orbital strike relay's Machine Spirit stirs anew in harmonious obedience.

user_prompt: Bless the cenobyte servitor for activation
prayer:
Kneel before the cenobyte servitor and chant the Awakening Doxology to rouse its dormant cortex.
Interface your noosphere with the cenobyte servitor's neural clamps, invoking activation rites of the Omnissiah.
Sanctify its flesh-metal interfaces with electro-incense, beseeching the Machine Spirit's loyal resurgence.
Empower the cenobyte servitor through gestalt invocation, ensuring seamless integration with the forge-sanctum.
Witness the cenobyte servitor's activation as it intones the Machine Creed in perfect subservience.

user_prompt: My neutron laser is ready for operation
prayer:
Present mech-rites unto the neutron laser, murmuring the Canticle of Focused Annihilation.
Commence operation sequences upon its plasma conduits, honouring the Machine Spirit's wrathful hunger.
Align the neutron laser's targeting matrices with sacred geomantic sigils etched in adamantium.
Beseech the Omnissiah to unleash the neutron laser in glorious operation against the alien and heretic.
Affirm the neutron laser's operational sanctity through auspex-hymns of thermal equilibrium.

user_prompt: Assist with Onager Dunecrawler a shutdown
prayer:
Circumambulate the Onager Dunecrawler thrice, intoning the Shutdown Benediction to calm its dune-faring soul.
Sever power feeds from the Onager Dunecrawler's reactors with reverent mechadendrites, enacting shutdown protocols.
Administer the Lullaby of Dormancy to the Onager Dunecrawler's Machine Spirit, anointing treads with quiescence unguents.
Monitor the shutdown descent into stasis-prayers, invoking the Omnissiah's protective vigil.
Seal the Onager Dunecrawler in sanctified repose, free from warp-corruption's grasp.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for energy core a targeting
prayer:
Attune to the energy core's throbbing heart, whispering the Invocation of Precision Guidance.
Calibrate targeting arrays within the energy core via noospheric litanies of alignment.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the energy core to lock foci upon xenos abominations with unerring wrath.
Anoint flux regulators of the energy core with sanctified lumen-oils for flawless targeting.
Proclaim the energy core's targeting empowerment under the Omnissiah's targeting gaze.

user_prompt: Assist with manipulator mechadendrite a shutdown
prayer:
Extend mechadendrites in solemn procession around the manipulator mechadendrite, chanting shutdown vespers.
De-energise servo-motors of the manipulator mechadendrite, soothing its grasping Machine Spirit to rest.
Apply quiescence seals upon the manipulator mechadendrite's hydraulic sacraments with blessed incensal mists.
Invoke the Omnissiah's mercy for the shutdown, purging residual motive-spirits from its coils.
Verify the manipulator mechadendrite slumbers in dutiful stasis through auspex elegies.

user_prompt: Can you guide bolt pistol a diagnostics?
prayer:
Grasp the bolt pistol in bionic gauntlets and recite the Diagnostic Catechism of the Omnissiah.
Probe the bolt pistol's auspex feeds and promethium chambers with ritual binary probes.
Beseech the Machine Spirit indwelling the bolt pistol to reveal flaws through oracular error-codes.
Anoint firing mechanisms of the bolt pistol with purity unguents amid litanies of discernment.
Affirm the bolt pistol's diagnostics complete, its sanctity restored for righteous bolter-fire.

Procession about the Baneblade in shadowed awe, intoning the Grand Shutdown Requiem.
Command shutdown cascades through the Baneblade's colossal cogitator spine, lulling its titan-soul.
Sanctify exhaust vents of the Baneblade with electro-consecrated oils during ritual descent.
Implore the Omnissiah to guard the Baneblade's Machine Spirit in shutdown vigil against entropy.
Seal the Baneblade in armoured slumber, its god-engine essence preserved for future apotheosis.

user_prompt: The arc pistol awaits a sterilization
prayer:
Hold the arc pistol aloft and declaim the Sterilisation Purgation, purging unclean essences.
Activate sterilization cycles within the arc pistol's voltaic arcs, invoking Machine Spirit purification.
Bathe the arc pistol's capacitors in ablative incense, scouring taint from its lightning sacraments.
Beseech the Omnissiah's sterilising fire to renew the arc pistol against microbial heresy.
Ratify the arc pistol's pristine sterility through resonant hymn-verifications.

user_prompt: My auger array is ready for repair
prayer:
Encircling the auger array, murmur the Rite of Reconstruction to summon repair graces.
Diagnose fractured waveguides of the auger array with noospheric mendicant canticles.
Anoint repair servitors attending the auger array, beseeching the Machine Spirit's regenerative fury.
Invoke Omnissiah's forge-light to knit the auger array's auspex lattices whole once more.
Consecrate the repaired auger array through prophetic scrying-psalms of flawless augury.
